text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We go to Director Akikawa's private<n>beach for
some extracurricular<n>activities one day.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But while we're in the middle of a<n>long-distance
swim, we suddenly get<n>caught in a huge storm.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, is this for real?! Did we seriously<n>get swept
onto a deserted island?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sure... I guess. But we're<n>literally in the
worst possible situation.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin seems shaken up by<n>the
unexpected turn of events.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, our phones still have a<n>signal, and
we're able to contact<n>Director Akikawa, who
organizes a<n>rescue squad to come get us soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If I'd known this wouldhappen, it would've just stayedhome and trained at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, we wouldn't have<n>gotten swept
out to the middle<n>nowhere...
choice_data_list:
Extracurricular activities come with a lot of
benefits, though.

Extracurricular activities come with a lot of
benefits, though.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her how training in<n>conditions different
from what she's<n>used to can help her adapt and
run in<n>all sorts of situations.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Then that means I'm getting left<n>further and
further behind the others...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Argh! Just thinking about that makes<n>me so mad!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's practically gnashing her teeth<n>in frustration.
I try to think of what I<n>can do to make her feel
better.
choice_data_list: Let's do what we can to be found sooner!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell Narita Taishin that if we train<n>while we're
waiting to be rescued,<n>then we can minimize lost
time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I'll do whatever exercises you<n>can think up,
so let me at 'em.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps feeling the pressure, Narita<n>Taishin
shows a surprisingly<n>willingness and quickly
agrees to my<n>proposal. I put together a training list
for her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hup... Hup!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh! There are so many branches<n>and rocks in
the sand! I can't run<n>properly with them in my
way!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(What kind of race would be on such<n>a beaten-up
track?!)
choice_data_list: Look ahead and find the best route!
Look ahead and find the best route!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do you seriously think I don't know<n>what to do?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Running on the obstacle-filled beach<n>appears to
improve her leg strength<n>and decision-making
skills better than<n>regular beach running.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! You want me to catch fish with<n>my bare
hands? Is this seriously<n>training?!
choice_data_list:
It'll help improve your motion-based vision and
reflexes!

It'll help improve your motion-based vision and
reflexes!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Really? If it turns out you're lying<n>just to get some
food, I'm gonna<n>wring your neck!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Argh, damn it! They keep darting<n>around!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You wanna mess with me? Then I'llcatch all of you!
Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I-I got one?! Trainer, what do I<n>do with this?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's all slimy and freaking out... Hurry<n>up and do
something!

All right! That's one fish down! I'm<n>gonna catch a
huge one next.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...What are you smiling about?
choice_data_list: I'm just glad you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What are you talking about,<n>bonehead? You
think I'm playing<n>here?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why am I doing all the work anyway?<n>Don't just
stand there. Pull some<n>weight, slacker.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Go look for shellfish in the sand or<n>dive for sea
urchins or something.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We spend our time completely<n>absorbed in training
with the natural<n>equipment around us until we're
rescued.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The training appears to pay off as<n>Narita Taishin
improves substantially<n>after we get home.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that we write "SOS" in the<n>sand to make
it easier for the rescue<n>squad to find us.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, okay. I'll get all restless if I<n>don't do
something.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We search the area and find a large<n>branch we
can use to write the<n>rescue message.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She takes over writing the message,<n>and I direct
her from far away to<n>make sure the letters are
large<n>enough to spot easily.
choice_data_list: The next letter should be three steps to the right!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Roger! ...Oof!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Damn... It's actually pretty tough<n>writing these
letters. I guess this<n>counts as training too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm done! The SOS message is good<n>to go!
choice_data_list: Great job. Have some coconut juice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: How'd you find coconut juice on adeserted... Wait, is that an actualcoconut?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! I've only seen people drink<n>straight out of a
coconut in video<n>games.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (This actually tastes pretty good...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew. I'm pooped.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, um...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The letters in the sand are great and<n>all, but what
do we do if no one ever<n>finds us?
choice_data_list:
We put our heart and soul into writing it, so it'll be
fine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. You would say somethinglike that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Did I seriously ask a question I knewthe answer to and still feel betterafter getting a response? Ugh, I'msuch a doofus.)
Hey... HEEEY!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that... the rescue squad?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey! Wake up, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, how can you even sleep at<n>a time like
this?! Get your act<n>together!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
A member of the rescue squad. He's<n>here
because he saw our SOS<n>message.

text_block_list.name: Rescue Squad Member
text_block_list.text:
We were able to locate you two<n>sooner than
expected thanks to that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While the unexpected incident was a<n>huge ordeal,
I feel as though I've<n>gotten a little closer to Narita
Taishin<n>as a result of today.
